sn46.25:1.1: "Bhikkhus, I will teach you seven things that lead to nondecline.Listen to that …sn.v.86
sn46.25:1.2: "And what, bhikkhus, are the seven things that lead to nondecline? They are: the seven factors of enlightenment. What seven? The enlightenment factor of mindfulness … the enlightenment factor of equanimity. These are the seven things that lead to nondecline."
